message.content:
# UI Design Detailed Description

## 1. Overall Layout and Structure
The design features a centered mobile phone mockup on a dark background, displaying a personal portfolio website. The phone is positioned vertically in the center of the screen with a black border and rounded corners. Below the phone mockup, there's a cookie consent banner spanning the full width of the viewport.

## 2. Text Content
- "Bruno Pal..." (truncated name in the phone status bar)
- "Download CV" (button text in the phone status bar)
- "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (green text in the phone display)
- "And I build websites." (green text in the phone display)
- "Full Stack MERN Developer |" (white text)
- "MongoDB - Express - React -" (white text)
- "Node.js | Creating efficient," (white text)
- "scalable web applications" (white text)
- "focused on user experience." (white text)
- "Projects" (white text)
- "This website uses cookies, pixel tags, and local storage for performance, personalization, and marketing purposes. Our use of some cookies may be considered a sale, sharing for behavioral advertising, or targeted advertising. For more, see our privacy policy. California Residents can learn how personal information is collected, including how it is used, whether it is "sold" or "shared", and how long it is retained." (gray text in cookie banner)
- "Opt out" (button text in cookie banner)
- "privacy policy" (blue link text)
- "California Residents" (blue link text)
- "collected" (blue link text)

## 3. Colors Used
- Background: Solid black (#000000)
- Phone border: Black with subtle white outline
- Phone screen background: Gradient from dark green to purple (#0a0a0a to #1a0033)
- Green text: Bright green (#00ff00)
- White text: Pure white (#ffffff)
- Gray text: Light gray (#aaaaaa)
- Blue links: Blue (#0066cc)
- Cookie banner background: Dark gray (#222222)
- Button background: Transparent with white border
- Button text: White

## 4. Component Types
- Mobile phone mockup (with status bar and screen)
- Status bar (top of phone)
- Main content area (phone screen)
- Text blocks
- Gradient background
- Cookie consent banner
- Link buttons
- Close button (X icon)

## 5. Typography Styles
- Phone status bar text: Small, light font (system font)
- Main heading: Bold, bright green, sans-serif
- Subheading: Regular weight, white, sans-serif
- Body text: Regular weight, white, sans-serif
- Project title: Regular weight, white, sans-serif
- Cookie banner text: Regular weight, light gray, sans-serif
- Link text: Regular weight, blue, sans-serif

## 6. Spacing and Alignment
- Phone mockup is centered both horizontally and vertically
- Content inside phone is left-aligned with generous padding
- Text blocks have consistent line spacing
- Cookie banner is positioned at the bottom of the viewport with padding
- Links in cookie banner are inline with surrounding text
- Close button is aligned to the right edge of the banner

## 7. Icons or Images
- User avatar (small circular image) in the phone status bar
- Close button (X icon) in the cookie banner

## 8. Navigation Elements
- "Download CV" button in the phone status bar
- "Projects" section header (likely a navigation element)
- "Opt out" button in the cookie banner
- "privacy policy" link
- "California Residents" link
- "collected" link

## Additional Details
- The phone mockup has a realistic design with a white border and subtle shadow
- The screen displays a gradient background transitioning from dark green to purple
- The text is arranged in a clean, hierarchical manner with proper spacing
- The cookie banner has a semi-transparent dark background with clear call-to-action buttons
- All interactive elements have appropriate hover states (though not visible in static image)
- The overall design emphasizes readability with high contrast between text and background

This design creates a professional, modern portfolio presentation with a focus on the developer's skills and projects, complemented by standard web compliance elements at the bottom.
